items.summary: Generate a new AI illustration hero image depicting the state map of Odisha overlaid with solar power elements (solar panels, sun rays, energy grid lines, warm amber/orange glow), suitable for use as a full-screen hero background. Save as 'hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png' in frontend/public/assets/generated.

Update the Hero component (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx) to replace the existing hero background illustration with the newly generated Odisha solar map image ('hero-odisha-solar-map.dim_1920x1080.png'). Ensure the image is displayed as a full-screen background with appropriate overlay to keep headline and CTA text readable.
